## Summary

## Checklist

- [ ] Tests added or updated for the change (`python -m unittest discover -s tests`)
- [ ] `ruff check .` and `ruff format --check .` pass
- [ ] `mypy` passes (strict)
- [ ] Code and identifiers are in English; docstrings/comments kept meaningful, not redundant
- [ ] New runtime dependencies, if any, are confined to a plugin (the kernel stays stdlib-only)
- [ ] Docs / README / ROADMAP updated if behavior or scope changed
